authority: D-local research source intake only; source records are evidence pointers, not provider truth, official ledger entries, company memory promotion, GitHub release proof, or external execution.

sources.title: MIDAS Framework (Current) session extracts
sources.freshness: Imported D-local session extracts from 2026-06-24; use as evidence input only until verified and promoted.
sources.researchSummary: Current MIDAS framework work should be converted from chat/session evidence into small local execution slices with authority labels, proof gates, and stop conditions.
sources.proposedSlice: Mine one current MIDAS Framework session-extract cluster into a local Command Centre run packet with evidence paths, proof condition, stop condition, and director review handoff.
sources.leverageClaim: This makes the Command Centre a repeatable research-to-execution router instead of a manual chat-memory recall surface.
sources.expectedArtifact: One saved research brief, one local run-control packet, and visible source-intake evidence labels.
sources.evidenceRequirement: Name exact D-local source paths, preserve session-extract evidence-only status, and return validation proof without quoting secrets or private raw transcript contents.
sources.proofCondition: Research packet and run packet show the current session-extract source path, unpromoted evidence status, forbidden actions, and UNKNOWN preservation.
sources.validationPlan: Run static checks, build, and desktop/mobile browser flow for Research source intake.
sources.stopCondition: Stop before deploy, provider mutation, external message, payment action, secret read, official ledger append, memory promotion, raw transcript promotion, or live-state claim.
sources.unknownsPreserved: Session extracts are evidence inputs only; provider/payment/deploy/auth/schema/revenue/live-state and promoted-memory status remain UNKNOWN until owning authorities prove them.

sources.title: MIDAS Framework (Archived) docs
sources.sourceEvidence: Knowledge/Frameworks/1. MIDAS/MIDAS-v1-Architecture.md; Knowledge/Frameworks/1. MIDAS/MIDAS-v1-Complete-Manifest.md; Knowledge/Frameworks/1. MIDAS/MIDAS_TRANSFORMATION_AUDIT.md; Knowledge/Frameworks/1. MIDAS/SPEC-midas-master-build.md
sources.freshness: Archived framework docs from March-April 2026; useful for comparison, not current doctrine when contradicted by CEO/state/source-authority files.
sources.researchSummary: Archived MIDAS framework docs can supply patterns and deltas, but must be compared against current D doctrine before execution.
sources.proposedSlice: Create one archive-vs-current delta packet that names the archived pattern, current authority boundary, proof requirement, and whether to reuse, revise, or park it.
sources.leverageClaim: Archive comparison prevents rebuilding old framework ideas blindly while still harvesting reusable architecture.
sources.expectedArtifact: One local research brief and run packet that clearly labels archived evidence and current authority checks.
sources.evidenceRequirement: Cite exact archived D-local files and the current authority files checked before proposing implementation.
sources.proofCondition: The packet labels archived docs as historical/reference only and preserves D/CEO/source-authority precedence.
sources.validationPlan: Run static checks, build, and Research source-intake browser proof.
sources.stopCondition: Stop before treating archived docs as current doctrine, creating duplicate kernels, deploying, provider mutation, external message, payment action, secret read, official ledger append, memory promotion, or live-state claim.
sources.unknownsPreserved: Archived material may be stale; current product/provider/GitHub/live-state and promoted-memory status remain UNKNOWN unless verified.

sources.title: MIDAS public framework candidate repo
sources.freshness: D-local source candidate; GitHub/release/public availability remains unverified unless GitHub evidence proves it.
sources.researchSummary: The public candidate repo is implementation evidence for source-neutral MIDAS controls, not proof of public release or live capability.
sources.proposedSlice: Convert one public-candidate capability into a Command Centre verification or run-control card without claiming publication or live usage.
sources.leverageClaim: Bringing repo capability into Command Centre as a verified local control makes the product spine useful without exposing private IP or making public claims.
sources.expectedArtifact: A local run-control packet that points to candidate repo files and names the public/private boundary.
sources.evidenceRequirement: Name exact repo paths and validation commands; do not claim GitHub release, npm package, or public use without evidence.
sources.proofCondition: Packet separates D-local candidate source from GitHub/public release truth and keeps approval gates visible.
sources.validationPlan: Run scoped static checks and browser source-intake proof; do not push or publish.
sources.stopCondition: Stop before GitHub push, npm publish, public repo claim, deploy, provider mutation, external message, payment action, secret read, official ledger append, memory promotion, or live-state claim.
sources.unknownsPreserved: GitHub release, npm publication, public availability, provider state, payment/revenue, and live usage remain UNKNOWN unless verified.
